title: CHOICE ADOPTIONS - 211info
text: CHOICE ADOPTIONS CHOICE ADOPTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Non-denominational faith-based organization that provides information and referrals to those experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Assists with adoption process for those seeking to adopt and birth parents seeking child placement after delivery. Operates a 24/7 hotline to speak with advocates. Can provide birth parent with healthcare, educational support, and vocational resources. May also be able to assist with pregnancy related expenses such as housing, food, prenatal care, and maternity clothing. 12901 SE 97th Avenue Suite 150 Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Pregnant women considering adoption services Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm 24/7 Pregnancy Helpline Email (503) 232-1211 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 232-1211 Pregnancy Helpline (503) 550-9310 Toll-free (866) 238-3281 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule appointment or visit website to download application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: States of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus 15 Services: Adoption Services Adoptive Family Recruitment Pro-Life Pregnancy Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHOICE ADOPTIONS
